_comment: Seed events for Milestone 4 testing. Trade date: 2026-06-25. These are realistic synthetic events matching the 8 symbols already seeded by seed_test_data.py.

events.raw_text: Reliance Industries Q4FY26 results announced: Net profit up 18% YoY to Rs 19,488 Cr, revenue grew 12% to Rs 2.44 lakh Cr. Jio ARPU improved to Rs 198, Retail segment posted record EBITDA. Beat analyst consensus on all major metrics.
Reliance Industries receives large order win for Jio 5G network expansion worth Rs 5,200 Cr from government broadband scheme. Execution expected over 24 months.

Infosys Q1FY27 quarterly result: Revenue guidance raised to 8-10% for FY27 (from 6-8% earlier). Q1 net profit Rs 6,921 Cr, up 7.4% YoY. Large deal wins of USD 4.1 bn, highest in 5 quarters. Management commentary positive on AI-driven demand.
Board meeting approval: Tata Motors board approves JLR refinancing plan, restructuring GBP 2.5 bn debt at lower rates. QIP fundraise of Rs 3,000 Cr approved to reduce net automotive debt.
Tata Motors QIP: Company to raise Rs 3,000 Cr via Qualified Institutional Placement at Rs 745 per share. Issue price at 4.5% discount to current market price.
CRISIL upgrades credit rating of Adani Enterprises Ltd from AA- to AA with stable outlook, citing improved leverage ratios and strong cash flows from diversified business segments.
Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd compliance disclosure: General regulatory filing for Q4FY26 annual accounts submitted to NSE and BSE as per SEBI listing obligations.

Motilal Oswal initiates coverage on Zomato Ltd with BUY rating and target price of Rs 280, implying 30% upside. Analyst cites improving unit economics, Blinkit expansion, and market leadership in quick commerce.
HDFC Bank: FII holding increases to 55.2% from 54.8% in previous quarter, indicating continued foreign institutional interest. No material corporate announcement.
